violations.text: Per PIC interview, hot hold unit (closest to service area) and oven are in poor repair and unusable at the time of this inspection. Work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024

Auto-dispenser for the 3-bay sink is dispensing quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution at a concentration greater than 400 ppm. Staff to dilute and test sanitizer until adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Per staff, they dilute the concentration from the dispenser with tap water. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the sanitizing buckets in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the cold drawer gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The walk-in freezer and cooler is in poor repair. Inspector observed the framing to the freezer doorway held with duct tape, several air curtain flaps missing, and a leak at the freezer condenser. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Food contact surfaces of ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, refrigerators, bread tray racks, bins for single service items, have an accumulation of dirt, food residue, and other debris. A portable fan has an accumulation of dust and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of trash, litter, and leaf litter. Dumpster enclosures must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The floors including inside the walk in cooler and freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
